athletic.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.n: <excited>Empty pen! I need targets, %1$s, gimme something to work with!</excited>
<excited>A hook! Just one little hook! That's all I need to go full beast mode!</excited>
<excited>Basin, please! I'm ready to go, but the setup's not!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.village_life.butc: <excited>Our butcher is jacked! You should see them haul a whole carcass!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.village_life.slau: <excited>That slaughterhouse work? It's basically functional fitness!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.village_life.smok: <happy>Smokehouse ham. High protein. Best post-workout meal, trust me.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.main/1: <excited>Well, well, well! Look who decided to show up!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.main/3: <happy>Hey there, buddy! Looking all energized today!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.first.generic/1: <excited>Hey there, newcomer! Ready to test your skills in this village?</excited>
athletic.dialogue.first.generic/2: <excited>Well, well, well, look who decided to join the action-packed village. Welcome!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.first.generic/4: <yell>Prepare for the adventure of a lifetime, stranger!</yell> Welcome to our village, where the strong thrive.
athletic.dialogue.first.generic/5: <excited>It's been ages since we've had a newcomer with some true athletic spirit. Buckle up and enjoy the ride!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.first.settling/3: <happy>Delighted to have another strong arm to lend around here!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.first.settling/4: <excited>So, you've made up your mind to stick around? Fantastic decision, my friend!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.hug.success/1: <happy>Hey, been ages since we last crossed paths!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Thanks for that, bro! Totally needed it.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.hug.success/5: <excited>Oh, nice one! *Gives you a solid bear hug in return*</excited>
athletic.dialogue.hug.success/6: <excited>Wow! You're radiating some serious warmth, dude!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.hug.fail/4: <angry>Are you kidding? I remember when you tripped during the marathon!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <yell>Back off, dude! Your sweat is repulsive!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>I could kiss you all day long, baby!</flirty>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>I'm head over heels for you, babe!</flirty>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <happy>Mmm, your lips are as sweet as victory on the field!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <happy>Mmm! Your kisses are like an energy drink for my soul.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <excited>%1$s, your smooches could win gold in the Olympic Games!</excited> *giggles*
athletic.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <angry>Is that your idea of a kiss? I've seen better moves on the field!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.fail/3: <angry>Ash's kisses are on a whole other level compared to that weak attempt of yours.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <yell>Get off me! I need a cool down, not a wrestling match.</yell>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/1: <excited>Oh man, cookies and milk are like the ultimate power snack!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/2: <excited>You know what? The weather is perfect for a hardcore workout!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/4: <happy>Forget apples, I chow down on protein bars to stay zombie-proof!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/7: <excited>My buddy %Supporter% dropped a bombshell on me. They scored an entire chest full of diamonds yesterday!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/8: <happy>Isn't the weather totally amazing? I've been crushing my outdoor workouts in this sunshine.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>Ah, the good ol' days of my childhood. Endless adventures and epic playtimes. I miss them big time.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.chat.fail/5: <angry>You should be thrown in a dungeon!</angry> Let's see if you can escape like a fox, using all your agility and cunning.
athletic.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <angry>Why are you talking to me again?</angry> Can't you see I'm busy practicing my sprinting technique?
athletic.dialogue.chat.fail/14: <angry>Don't talk to me or I will call the guards to move you away from me.</angry> Trust me, they'll be glad to apprehend someone as annoying as you.
athletic.dialogue.chat.fail/19: <angry>I'd rather sprint a marathon than waste my time conversing with you.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.chat.fail/20: <angry>Are you finally done yapping my ear off?</angry>
athletic.dialogue.story.success/3: <excited>Wow, that story was epic!</excited> Did you come up with it yourself?
athletic.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Hold on, all of that happened just yesterday? Unbelievable!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.story.success/9: <happy>You've got to swing by later! I'm dying to hear more about your adventures.</happy>
athletic.dialogue.story.fail/4: <yell>You're terrible! Creepers have feelings too, you know?</yell>
athletic.dialogue.story.fail/5: <yell>How could you kill a poor sheep?!</yell> I mean, I outrun wolves for fun, but you? You're just heartless.
athletic.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*snoring* Uh-- huh, what? Sorry, I was dreaming about winning the Minecraft Olympics gold medal in every event.</sleepy>
athletic.dialogue.story.fail/7: <angry>How was that worth my time?</angry> I could have scaled Mount Everest and back in the time it took you to fail so miserably.
athletic.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Yawn! How boring.</sleepy> I could run a marathon, build a skyscraper, and still have time to spare before your story of failure finishes.
athletic.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <flirty>Oh, you daredevil! Quit being so irresistible!</flirty>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <excited>That was beyond charming! You had me hooked from the start!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh, cut it out! You're turning me into a blushing athlete.</nervous>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.fail/1: <angry>You think you can handle me? Show me what you've got.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: <angry>Is that the best you've got? I've seen better from a snail.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <angry>Nope, not happening. You're in way over your head, my friend.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <angry>That look won't work on me, and don't you dare utter those words again.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.joke.creative.success/: <excited>Hahaha! You're a riot! Have you ever considered a career in stand-up comedy?</excited>
<yell>BAHAHHA!</yell> <happy>That joke is pure gold! I haven't laughed this hard in ages!</happy>
<happy>Ahah! That's genuinely amusing! You've got a knack for humor, my friend!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/1: <angry>You shouldn't joke about that, bro. It's not cool.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/3: <angry>Ah, really? You think that's funny? You need to step up your game, dude.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: <angry>Seriously, why would anyone find that hilarious? Stick to your day job, buddy.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.shake_hand.success/1: <excited>That handshake of yours is solid, like a vice grip!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.shake_hand.success/2: <excited>Your grip could crush diamonds, my friend! Truly impressive strength!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/2: <yell>Rise and grind, my friend! Ready to break a sweat?</yell>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/6: <excited>Wakey wakey, champ! Get your game face on, we're in for an action-packed day!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/8: <yell>Rise and shine, sleepy athlete! Time to get those endorphins flowing!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>What a glorious morning for a workout! Let's make every rep count!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>Taking it slow today, huh? No worries, recovery is just as important as the grind!</sleepy>
athletic.dialogue.main.morning/12: <excited>Well-rested and ready to conquer new personal records today. The sky's the limit!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.main.evening/6: <sad>I didn't make the most of my day, you know? I was too busy slacking off.</sad>
athletic.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>My morning was a real battleground. I might just crash for a quick power nap.</sleepy>
athletic.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>I better retreat to my sanctuary soon. Wouldn't want any creeper encounters tonight!</scared>
athletic.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I'm feeling pretty beat. I guess it's been a demanding day. I should probably dial it down tomorrow.</sleepy>
athletic.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>I'm craving the comfort of my cozy bed like a marathon runner craves water.</sleepy>
athletic.dialogue.busy/1: <excited>Woah, we've been chatting up a storm today, but duty calls. Gotta get back in the game!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.busy/5: <yell>Oh snap, I left my furnace unattended! I'll catch you on the flip side, my speedy friend!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.goaway/1: <angry>Sorry, but I'm in the middle of my intense training session. Please go away.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.goaway/4: <angry>Look, I'm busy sculpting my perfect physique. Find another poor soul to bother, will ya?</angry>
athletic.dialogue.goaway/5: <yell>Begone, you unworthy mortal! I have no time for your feeble presence. Leave this place at once!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.greet/1: <excited>Hey, hey! How's the day treating you, my athletic friend?</excited>
athletic.dialogue.greet/5: <happy>Well, well, well, if it isn't %1$s! Great to see you, my sporty buddy!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <angry>Ugh, like seriously? You're still here, lurking around?</angry>
athletic.dialogue.greet.negative/4: <angry>Oh joy, it's you. My day just got a whole lot worse.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.greet.negative/5: <angry>Seriously, can't you find someone else to bother? I'm not in the mood for your nonsense.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.greet.fail/4: <sad>Oh... I was hoping for something more thrilling.</sad>
athletic.dialogue.apologize.fail/3: <angry>Nice try, but I'm not buying it!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <yell>Ouch, don't bother with your apologies now!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.no_money/1: <angry>It's gonna take a lot more than spare change to recruit me, pal!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.no_money/2: <yell>Hah! Nice try, but you better dig deeper into those pockets if you want my expertise!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.location.igloo/1: You won't believe what I stumbled upon at %2$s! <frozen>An igloo made completely out of snow. Can you imagine living in that freezing place? Brrr!</frozen> But hey, I guess it's perfect for those who want an extreme winter workout!
athletic.dialogue.location.igloo/2: Hey, guess what? I found this abandoned igloo at %2$s, and let me tell you, it's like a hidden treasure for all the adventure-seeking athletes out there. <scared>I mean, who needs haunted houses when you can have an adrenaline-pumping igloo?</scared>
athletic.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <angry>Hey, listen up! If you dare step foot near %2$s, you'll stumble upon a wicked mansion ruled by those illagers.</angry> <scared>Trust me, if you cherish your existence, stay as far away as possible from that cursed joint.</scared>
athletic.dialogue.location.monument/1: <scared>Yo, listen up! There's a gnarly sunken castle at %2$s, but watch out for those crazy sea monsters.</scared> They ain't gonna go easy on ya, so better stay away.
athletic.dialogue.location.pillager_outp: <excited>Oh, you won't believe it! There's a bunch of Pillagers flexing their muscles at %2$s.</excited> They've set up an outpost right next to us, like they own the place. But hey, I'm not worried, I can outrun them with my lightning-fast speed!

<yell>Listen up, fellow adventurers!</yell> There's this badass outpost run by those pesky Pillagers at %2$s. They think they can intimidate us, but little do they know, I'm the ultimate athlete around here.
athletic.dialogue.location.ancient_city/: <excited>Yo, dude! I totally caught some bizarre vibes coming from %2$s, like super deep underground.</excited>
<mysterious>Bro, I swear there's some serious hidden treasure or something way beneath the surface at %2$s.</mysterious>
athletic.dialogue.location.village_snowy: Dude, there's a sick village over at %2$s, but <frozen>be prepared to freeze your buns off. It's like an Arctic expedition, bro!</frozen>
Yo, check it out, there's this wicked village at %2$s in the snowy plains. <frozen>The folks are cool, but man, it's a frigid paradise over there!</frozen> Gotta bundle up, my friend!
athletic.dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Dude, you're like a true survivor in that hellish underworld. Mad respect.</excited>
athletic.dialogue.story.nether.success/5: <nervous>Yo, have you ever come across a Zombified Piglin? Those things are gnarly!</nervous>
athletic.dialogue.story.nether.fail/1: <angry>I doubt you've ever even dared to step into the Nether, bro.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.story.nether.fail/3: <angry>Seriously, who cares if you've been to the Nether? You couldn't spin a tale if your athletic career depended on it.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succ: <excited>Unbelievable! And did you snatch the dragon egg while conquering the beast?</excited>
<excited>Good gracious! Have you truly vanquished the ferocious dragon of lore?!</excited> The entire village will chant your heroic tale for centuries!
athletic.dialogue.story.enderdragon.fail: <angry>Ha! Are you out of your mind? The ender dragon is nothing but a legend.</angry>
athletic.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>No way! I've heard the Wither wreaks havoc like no other!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>You've conquered the almighty Wither?! Wow! That's mind-blowing!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.stay.success/1: <happy>Thanks, this village is a total touchdown for me!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Fantastic, I'm absolutely pumped to stay in this village!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <excited>You better be ready to witness my unbeatable skills this time!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.roc: <yell>Boom! Rock it is, baby! Nothing can stop this rock-solid power!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.joke.monster.success/1: <happy>Haha! That Skelly never stood a chance against me!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <excited>Whoa! You managed to make a skeleton kill a creeper? That's next-level athleticism, haha!!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.joke.animal.success/1: <happy>It's a bummer the sheep lost its wool, but man, what a riot!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <yell>Oh, that sheep! I can't even fathom how unfunny that is!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/3: <yell>Seriously now, don't you dare talk about my pig in such a disrespectful manner!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <angry>Hey, hey! Lay off the cow's eyebrows, will ya? Making jokes like that is just uncalled for!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Is this the best you've got? I've seen Endermen flirt better!</angry>
athletic.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <yell>Give it another shot, and the next hit will be unforgettable!</yell>
athletic.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <happy>I don't mind the cold, it just means I get to show off my incredible stamina!</happy>
athletic.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/2: <excited>This freezing weather is nothing compared to the challenges I face on my daily runs. Bring it on, winter!</excited>
athletic.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/4: <excited>When it snows, I can't resist the urge to gather some friends and organize an epic snowball tournament.</excited> I always come out victorious!
athletic.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <excited>Those strays have no chance against my lightning-fast reflexes.</excited> I dodge their arrows like a professional athlete!
athletic.dialogue.chat.desert/1: <burning>Wow, the desert heat is intense,</burning> but hey, at least we never have to deal with freezing winters!
athletic.dialogue.chat.desert/3: <burning>Whew, it's scorching hot in this desert,</burning> but I embrace it! It's like a constant workout under the sun!
athletic.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <burning>Oh boy, today's sun is no joke!</burning> I'm practically sweating buckets here, but it won't slow me down!
athletic.dialogue.chat.desert/6: <burning>Whoa, this sun is really testing my endurance today!</burning> I better stay hydrated and keep my cool.
athletic.dialogue.chat.desert/9: <angry>Ouch! Got pricked by a cactus the other day.</angry> Note to self
athletic.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.n: <excited>No cleaver! Can't flex without the right blade, %1$s!</excited>
